title: Securitron Iron Golem
description: The resource pack will add a Securitron model from the Fallout game, which is ideal to replace the golem model.
body:
# Securitron Iron Golem

The resource pack will add a Securitron model from the Fallout game, which is ideal to replace the golem model.

Need Optifine.

## Features

- New regular textures (A little rusty, rusty, old)
- Biome variations
- Golem monitor animation
- If you call a golem "Def", it will become ordinary
- Added Viktor ??
